theory.canonical_statement: The companion theorem defines a configuration-force bundle with metric-induced volume form and volumetric force equilibration.
theory.technical_interpretation: The equation support layer follows \mathcal{M}\ \mathrm{smooth\ Riemannian\ manifold}; dV_g=\sqrt{|\det g|}\,dx^1\wedge\cdots\wedge dx^n; (\mathcal{M},\mathcal{F},\mathcal{V}); \mathrm{Stillness}(S)\Longleftrightarrow\int_{\mathrm{Support}(S)}F_{\mu}(x)V[S,x]\,dx=0. These relations are compact review objects, not unsupported placeholders.

reviewed_source_symbols.description: volume functional or volumetric coupling component.

dictionary_sections.tzp_thesaurus:
\begin{enumerate}[leftmargin=1.6em,itemsep=6pt,topsep=4pt]
\item Canonical carrier: the repaired mathematical relation used as the entry spine.
\item Source grounding: the D-drive file or row that supplies the relation.
\item TRAWIN closure: the interpretation through time, rotation, action, wave, integration, and normalization.
\end{enumerate}
